name: HWM_TM_REC_CHG_SUBRESOURCE_V
query: SELECT HwmTmRecChangeAtrbs.TM_REC_CHANGE_ID TM_REC_CHANGE_ID, HwmTmRecChangeAtrbs.VALUE_NUMBER SUBRESOURCE_ID FROM HWM_TM_REC_CHANGE_ATRBS HwmTmRecChangeAtrbs, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B HwmTmAtrbFldsB WHERE HwmTmRecChangeAtrbs.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID = HwmTmAtrbFldsB.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID AND HwmTmAtrbFldsB.NAME = 'SubresourceId'
